column1: William Contreras stands out as the top pick, offering steady production near the top of the order and a favorable matchup against Bailey Falter, who has struggled to limit hits. Contreras has recorded a hit in nearly 75% of games, making him a reliable option for Beat The Streak. Ceddanne Rafaela also benefits from the same soft matchup and has been hot lately, while Bobby Witt Jr. remains a strong alternative with elite consistency at home.
